source_tree_note: During the audit the worktree contained an uncommitted active patch in src/gpuwrf/physics/noahmp_coupler.py that decouples the NoahMP sfctmp fallback. This audit did not edit source and treats that patch as observed external work.

theta_convention.runtime_state_theta: WRF coupled moist potential temperature theta_m, per sprint prompt and direct NoahMP probe
theta_convention.qv_units: WRF water-vapor mixing ratio kg/kg, QVAPOR
theta_convention.physics_expectation: WRF physics that forms T, TH, THX, THV, density, or dry-theta tendencies expects dry theta-derived values unless the specific dycore/prognostic interface says otherwise

summary.area: Prognostic state, lateral boundary, feedback, and mass-scalar dynamics
summary.status: Do not dry-decouple these storage or transport paths.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/init/real_init/types.py:109 documents WRF use_theta_m and THM storage.
src/gpuwrf/init/real_init/lateral_bc.py:236 stores THM when use_theta_m is enabled.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/boundary_apply.py:148 applies theta_bdy into state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/dynamics/advection.py:262 advects theta as a prognostic mass scalar.
summary.required_action: Keep state.theta moist at model boundaries and in dycore transport; decouple only at physics adapter input/output boundaries.

summary.area: MYNN grid-backed path and generic grid-backed surface column view
summary.status: Production grid-backed path already converts moist theta to dry theta before physics and recouples MYNN output dry theta to moist theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1313 decouples MYNN column theta using qv.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1404 recouples MYNN dry theta output to moist theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1648 builds dry_theta and t_air for grid-backed surface physics.
src/gpuwrf/runtime/operational_mode.py:3188 converts dry theta and qv sources to moist theta source in source-leaf mode.
summary.required_action: Preserve this pattern and move remaining physics adapters toward the same explicit dry-view and moist-writeback API.

summary.status: The observed active patch decouples only the NoahMP sfctmp fallback. The upstream column view and surface diagnostics still expose raw moist theta to sfclay diagnostics and flux seed terms.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/noahmp_surface_hook.py:79 builds a column view with raw state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/physics/noahmp_coupler.py:161 calls surface_layer_with_diagnostics on that raw view.
src/gpuwrf/physics/noahmp_coupler.py:238 builds thx/fltv from raw state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/noahmp_surface_hook.py:161 overlays diagnostics through the same raw-view hook.
summary.required_action: Build a dry surface view for NoahMP, including sfctmp, t_air, th2/thx, virtual-temperature and CH/CM seed diagnostics; retain the active sfctmp dry fallback but do not stop there.

summary.status: Uses raw moist theta to form T, TH2, and FLTV inputs.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/noahclassic_surface_hook.py:161 forms t_air from _temperature_from_theta(state.theta, state.p).
src/gpuwrf/coupling/noahclassic_surface_hook.py:181 assembles forcing with raw state.theta at the bottom level.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/noahclassic_surface_hook.py:251 uses raw theta in fltv.
summary.required_action: Use dry theta for bottom-air temperature and surface-layer theta quantities before Noah Classic forcing and flux diagnostics.

summary.status: Inputs temperature from raw moist theta and writes dry theta output directly back into moist state.theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1155 forms Thompson temperature with _temperature_from_theta(state.theta, state.p).
src/gpuwrf/physics/thompson_column.py:180 documents temperature input and derived density.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1187 converts output temperature to dry theta and stores it as state.theta.
summary.required_action: Feed Thompson with dry-theta temperature and recouple returned dry theta with updated qv before updating state.theta.

summary.status: Kessler, Lin, WSM3, WSM5, WSM6, WDM5, WDM6, and Morrison adapters pass raw state.theta into kernels that expect dry potential temperature or derive temperature from theta*pi.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:157 passes mp(state.theta) to Kessler.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:176 passes mp(state.theta) to Lin.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:203 passes mp(state.theta) to WSM6.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:222 passes mp(state.theta) to WSM3.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:240 passes mp(state.theta) to WSM5.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:258 passes mp(state.theta) to Morrison.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:277 passes mp(state.theta) to WDM5.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:312 passes mp(state.theta) to WDM6.
src/gpuwrf/physics/microphysics_kessler.py:135 and src/gpuwrf/physics/microphysics_wsm6.py:1091 convert theta and pii to temperature.
summary.required_action: Decouple theta before each microphysics call and recouple any returned dry theta or dry theta tendency with the adapter's updated qv.

summary.area: Radiation adapters and radiation tendency application
summary.status: Column input builders form temperature and density from raw moist theta. Source-leaf mode has a dry-to-moist tendency conversion, but the default held-radiation path can still add dry RTHRATEN directly into moist state.theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:965 builds RRTMG column temperature from raw state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1067 computes density with raw-theta temperature.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1826 through 2382 wires RRTMG, Dudhia, GSFC, and classic RRTM theta tendency paths through those inputs.
src/gpuwrf/runtime/operational_mode.py:3171 converts dry radiation/PBL source terms to moist only when source-leaf mode is active.
src/gpuwrf/runtime/operational_mode.py:3207 adds held_rthraten directly in the default path.
summary.required_action: Use dry-theta temperature and density for radiation inputs and ensure every radiation theta tendency update is converted to the moist prognostic convention, including the default held tendency path.

summary.status: Revised MM5, Pleim-Xiu, old MM5, GFS, and flux-handle helpers form bottom temperature or theta from raw moist theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:352 computes surface-layer bottom T from state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:383 wires Revised MM5 inputs.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:403 wires Pleim-Xiu theta_bottom from state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:429 recomputes T0 and thx for flux handles from raw theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:456 wires old MM5.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:481 wires GFS.
summary.required_action: Use the same dry bottom-air view as the grid-backed generic surface adapter; avoid the raw no-grid fallback for operational scan adapters.

summary.status: YSU, ACM2, BouLac, MRF, MYJ surface, and MYJ PBL use raw moist theta for T/theta inputs and add dry theta tendencies directly to moist state.theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:971 builds PBL surface forcing through a raw fallback surface view.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:1063 wires YSU with raw-theta temperature.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:1077 wires ACM2 with raw theta and T.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:1091 wires BouLac with raw theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:1126 wires MRF with raw-theta temperature.
src/gpuwrf/physics/myj_adapters.py:63 builds MYJ geometry from raw-theta T/theta.
src/gpuwrf/physics/myj_adapters.py:176 adds MYJ RTHBLTEN directly to state.theta.
summary.required_action: Decouple all PBL input T/theta fields and recouple any returned dry theta tendency or final dry theta state with qv.

summary.status: KF, Tiedtke, Grell-Freitas, and BMJ compute temperature, density, virtual theta, or dry RTHCUTEN from raw moist theta. Grell-Freitas additionally multiplies raw state.theta by a virtual factor, which double counts moisture if theta is already theta_m.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:507 wires KF with raw-theta T and density.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:588 wires Tiedtke with raw-theta T.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:751 wires Grell-Freitas with raw-theta T.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:819 forms thv = state.theta * (1 + 0.608*qv).
src/gpuwrf/coupling/scan_adapters.py:877 wires BMJ with raw-theta T.
summary.required_action: Use dry theta for T, density, and virtual-theta construction and convert dry cumulus theta tendencies to moist prognostic tendencies when qv changes.

summary.status: GWDO is momentum-only at writeback, but it forms the thermodynamic temperature profile from raw moist theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:2475 forms GWDO temperature from state.theta.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:2488 leaves theta and qv unchanged.
src/gpuwrf/physics/gwd_gwdo.py:132 expects temperature input.
summary.required_action: Feed GWDO with dry-theta temperature; no theta recoupling is needed because GWDO does not update theta.

summary.status: Output T and surface diagnostics expose raw moist theta as dry WRF T perturbation or surface-layer theta.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/coupling/driver.py:1155 writes T = state.theta - 300.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/driver.py:1201 builds surface output diagnostics from raw state.theta and raw surface_layer_with_diagnostics.
summary.required_action: When writing WRF-style diagnostic variables, convert theta_m back to dry theta first and use dry surface diagnostics for T2/Q2/U10/V10.

summary.area: Real-init hydrostatic helpers and analytic/no-grid physics fallbacks
summary.status: Real-init hydrostatic code already separates dry theta and qv factors. Several physics_couplers no-grid fallbacks intentionally expose raw arrays for analytic callers and should not be treated as operational proof without caller-specific tests.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/init/real_init/hydrostatic.py:64 uses dry theta plus explicit qvf.
src/gpuwrf/init/real_init/hydrostatic.py:226 converts a dry theta perturbation to temperature.
src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py:1313 and :1648 have explicit grid-backed dry paths but raw fallback behavior when grid metrics are absent.
summary.required_action: Leave real-init dry/moist split intact; require tests for no-grid analytic fallbacks before using them as runtime physics evidence.

summary.status: This audit does not recommend dry-decoupling dycore storage or transport, but the EOS helper path should be explicitly tested for whether it expects dry theta plus qv or theta_m.
evidence: src/gpuwrf/dynamics/acoustic_wrf.py:135 includes an optional qv factor in inverse-density diagnostics.
src/gpuwrf/dynamics/acoustic_wrf.py:279 passes state.theta and state.qv into that helper.
src/gpuwrf/dynamics/core/rk_addtend_dry.py:127 computes diagnostics from state.theta without qv.
summary.required_action: Do not alter dycore convention in this physics-consumer fix. Add a separate dycore savepoint/oracle gate for theta_m EOS qv-factor consistency.

minimal_helper_api.location: Prefer one shared coupling-level helper near existing _temperature_from_theta/_theta_from_temperature and the WRF constants in src/gpuwrf/coupling/physics_couplers.py, or a small shared constants/helper module imported by adapters.
functions: rv_over_rd() -> 461.6 / 287.0 from one WRF-compatible constant source

moist_theta_tendency_from_dry(theta_dry_old, qv_old, dry_theta_tendency, qv_tendency) -> (1 + rv_over_rd*qv_old)*dry_theta_tendency + rv_over_rd*theta_dry_old*qv_tendency for source terms, or use finite recoupling with updated qv
implementation_constraints: Keep conversions elementwise JAX operations so they fuse and remain GPU resident.
Do not use specific-humidity constants such as 0.622 in the theta_m conversion; qv here is WRF mixing ratio.
Do not dry-convert boundary, feedback, or dycore prognostic storage.
Make dry-vs-moist intent explicit at adapter boundaries instead of overloading state.theta.

required_regression_gates: After the NoahMP fix, rerun the strict Step-1 NoahMP closure with use_noahmp=True and compare SFCTMP/T_ML, HFX, LH, T2, Q2, CH, CM, FLTV against WRF savepoints.

Add a CPU helper unit/probe that constructs theta_dry, qv, p, derives theta_m, and verifies dry helper T matches the dry oracle while raw _temperature_from_theta(theta_m, p) reproduces the expected warm bias.
Add adapter-level probes for NoahMP and Noah Classic bottom-air temperature, th2/thx, virtual temperature, and flux-handle fields.

Add radiation column-input parity for RRTMG SW/LW, Dudhia, GSFC, and classic RRTM, plus a tendency-application gate that proves dry RTHRATEN is converted before updating moist state.theta in all runtime modes.

Add microphysics, cumulus, PBL, MYJ, and GWDO smoke/parity cases that initialize theta_m and assert each adapter feeds dry theta-derived T/theta to the kernel and leaves state.theta moist after qv changes.
Keep all new gates CPU-runnable with JAX_PLATFORMS=cpu and CUDA_VISIBLE_DEVICES= for this sprint; performance claims require later GPU profiler artifacts.

gate_results.completion_marker: ATTEMPTED: tmux send-keys to 0:2 failed with Operation not permitted; proof files are authoritative per contract

commands_run: rg -n "state\.theta|_temperature_from_theta|theta_m|THM|RTH|theta" src/gpuwrf/init/real_init src/gpuwrf/physics src/gpuwrf/coupling src/gpuwrf/runtime src/gpuwrf/dynamics
nl -ba selected physics kernels under src/gpuwrf/physics for expected T/theta semantics
tmux send-keys -t 0:2 'GPT MOIST_THETA_CONSUMER_AUDIT DONE - see proofs/v014/moist_theta_physics_consumer_audit.md' Enter
